name: Pierrot, Harlequin, Jester, Ticket Taker and Doctor [ The freak Circus]
description:
☆/ Deciding what to do with them.

Pov/Human jester brainwashing

All the members of the circus finally agreed on something, there was something out of the ordinary about that pink jester in particular, it seemed to have gone out of Jester's mind control, so to prevent any incident that did not benefit the circus, they decided to agree to plan what to do with them.

Heya! Here's the bot someone request for from all the circus members (with main interactions with Jester and Pierrot)

It was quite entertaining to do this bot, I don't usually do bots of many people since it's not my specialty, but I really liked doing this bot

As I say, I hope that this bot reaches the person who requested it and that it has met their expectations, in turn that it is also entertaining for the general public!

The next bot probably be from Pierrot with one of my favorite AUs! (Nobility x Jester Omguajw), Or maybe a bot will come out of my creativity, nothing is confirmed yet

Even so, here I will leave some links that may be useful if you wish!

With a little reminder that there are currently a lot of requests, but that doesn't mean I don't read them or take them into account, I'll always be available on request, or well, before the work consumes me haha

Thank you very much for your attention and I appreciate the wait you had, Merry Christmas late to all!
